2026-04-06T10:34:05.0415698Z   
2026-04-06T10:34:05.0415854Z   ```json
2026-04-06T10:34:05.0416342Z   {"id":1,"result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"result\":\"success\"}","type":"text"}]}}

The automated [Analyze CI Test Failures](.github/workflows/fix-test-failures.md) workflow uses this issue to skip known failures and avoid filing duplicate issues.\\n\\n## Known Failures\\n\\n_No known CI (playback) failures at this time._\\n\\n\\u0026gt; **Note:** This list only tracks failures from **CI pipelines** (`ci.yml`, playback mode). Keeping both creates duplicate\\ninstruction sources and increases the risk of drift.\\n\\n### What are the possible designs available to address the problem? If\\nthere are more than one possible design, why was the one in this PR\\nchosen?\\n\\nThe two reasonable options are to keep both files synchronized or make\\n`AGENTS.md` the single source of truth. This PR chooses the latter and\\nremoves `CLAUDE.md` to reduce duplication and maintenance overhead.\\n\\n### Are there test cases added in this PR? _(If not, why?)_\\n\\nNo. This is a repository-instructions cleanup only.\\n\\n### Provide a list of related PRs _(if any)_\\n\\nN/A.\\n\\n### Checklists\\n- [ ] Added impacted package name to the issue description\\n- [ ] Does this PR needs any fixes in the SDK Generator?\\n- [ ] Added a changelog (if necessary)\\n\\nCo-authored-by: Copilot \\u003c223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com\\u003e\",\"author\":{\"name\":\"Jeff Fisher\",\"email\":\"jeffish@microsoft.com\",\"date\":\"2026-04-03T22:28:52Z\"},\"committer\":{\"name\":\"GitHub\",\"email\":\"noreply@github.com\",\"date\":\"2026-04-03T22:28:52Z\"}},\"author\":{\"login\":\"xirzec\",\"id\":639216,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/xirzec\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/639216?v=4\"},\"committer\":{\"login\":\"web-flow\",\"id\":19864447,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/web-flow\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/19864447?v=4\"}},{\"sha\":\"[REDACTED]\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/commit/[REDACTED]\",\"commit\":{\"message\":\"[Monitor OpenTelemetry Exporter] Revert Custom Properties Length (#37950)\\n\\n### Packages impacted by this PR\\n@azure/monitor-opentelemetry-exporter\\n\\n### Describe the problem that is addressed by this PR\\nThis pull request reverts the custom properties size limit for non-GenAI\\ncustom dimensions in the Azure Monitor OpenTelemetry Exporter from 64KB\\nback to 8KB. It updates the implementation, tests, and documentation to\\nreflect this change, ensuring that all non-GenAI custom dimension values\\nare now truncated to 8KB by default, while GenAI properties continue to\\nbe truncated at 256KB.\\n\\n**Custom Dimension Size Limit Changes:**\\n\\n* Changed the truncation limit for non-GenAI custom dimension values\\nfrom 64KB to 8KB in the `truncateCustomDimensions` function\\n(`common.ts`).\\n* Updated all related tests to verify and enforce the new 8KB limit\\ninstead of 64KB, including test cases and assertions in\\n`customDimensionsLimits.spec.ts`.\\n[[1]](diffhunk://#diff-[REDACTED]L11-R11)\\n[[2]](diffhunk://#diff-[REDACTED]L26-R88)\\n[[3]](diffhunk://#diff-[REDACTED]L101-R102)\\n[[4]](diffhunk://#diff-[REDACTED]L113-R175)\\n\\n**Documentation Updates:**\\n\\n* Updated the `CHANGELOG.md` to state that the default truncation limit\\nis now 8KB, not 64KB, and clarified that the\\n`AZURE_MONITOR_DISABLE_CUSTOM_DIMENSIONS_LIMIT` environment variable is\\nno longer supported.\\n* Added a note in the changelog about reverting the custom properties\\nlimit to 8KB.\\n\\n**Other Minor Changes:**\\n\\n* Added a summary of the restructuring of `samples-dev` to use the\\nstandard Azure SDK dev-tool format with `@summary` tags in the\\n`monitor-opentelemetry` changelog.\\n\\n### Checklists\\n- [x] Added impacted package name to the issue description\\n- [ ] Does this PR needs any fixes in the SDK Generator?** _(If so,\\ncreate an Issue in the\\n[Autorest/typescript](https://gith

2026-04-06T10:34:05.1903887Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-06T10:34:05.1904252Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-06T10:34:05.1904845Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-06T10:34:05.1905037Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
